title: RollbackManager y backup local controlado
wave: Ola 5 — Sandbox, patch/refactor ejecutable y rollback

architectural_decision.reason: FUNC-SPRINT-42 implementa una capacidad prevista explícitamente por Fase C sobre contratos existentes: ChangeSet, PatchSandbox, Approval Workflow, PolicyEngine, SecretGuard, ReportEngine y LocalStore. No introduce dependencias externas, red, APIs, modelos, Git write, restauración automática, refactor execution ni deploy.

pass_criteria: RollbackManager creates rollback plans from ChangeSet JSON files.
RollbackPoint metadata is persisted under .devpilot/rollback runtime paths.
Local backups are created only for safe workspace files.
rollback list/show are read-only and parseable.
rollback execute is approval-gated and non-mutating in Sprint 42.
MIASI declares rollback tools and policy rules.
block_criteria: Rollback execute can mutate files without approval.
Rollback target path escapes workspace root.
Backup stores secret-like content without blocking.
Rollback runtime points are packaged as release artifacts.
The sprint enables Git write, deploy or refactor execution.
risks: Rollback remains initial and metadata-driven, not a complete transactional restore engine.
Backups can consume local disk space.
Secret-like files are blocked and require manual handling.
Future execute semantics must add tests, approval and restore validation.
